center.name: 科洛尼亚-德尔萨克拉门托
center.summary: 科洛尼亚-德尔萨克拉门托是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Fulvous-crowned scrub tyrant，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: meloryphus in Colonia del Sacramento, Uruguay | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Euscarthmus | species = meloryphus | authority = Wied, 1831 | synonyms = | range_map = Euscarthmus meloryphus map.svg }} The fulvous-crowned scrub tyrant, or tawny-crowned pygmy-tyrant, (Euscarthmus meloryphus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Paraguay, Peru, Uruguay, and Venezuela.Remsen, J
